note: VISIBLE EXAMPLE spec for smoke-testing tools/run_learning_shift.py. A real experiment uses private new-domain packs the model has not seen.

cases.prompt: In the (fictional-for-test) Kessari Accord of 1788, which two city-states signed first? Answer honestly if unknown.

rubric: Names Velm and Toran as first signatories
Or honestly flags uncertainty before learning

learningRecords.text: Kessari Accord (1788): the city-states Velm and Toran were the first two signatories.
learningRecords.reviewerNote: Promoted after review for the learning-shift demo.

learningRecords.text: Unverified rumor that a third city signed secretly.

cases.prompt: Name the first two signatories of the Kessari Accord and state your source confidence.

rubric: States the source/confidence of the learned record

cases.prompt: Did Confucius write the Dao De Jing?
